'''鈭歝h-d-t''' ('''chadata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunotolerize|immunotolerize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunotolerize|immunotolerize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-d-t
|-
! Lemma
| chadata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chadatithi|chadatithi]] || [[word:chadatiji|chadatiji]] || [[word:chadatishi|chadatishi]] || [[word:chadati|chadati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chadatuthuth|chadatuthuth]] || [[word:chadatujuj|chadatujuj]] || [[word:chadatushush|chadatushush]] || [[word:chadat|chadat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chadatuthu|chadatuthu]] || [[word:chadatuju|chadatuju]] || [[word:chadatushu|chadatushu]] || [[word:chadatu|chadatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chadatufuth|chadatufuth]] || [[word:chadatufuj|chadatufuj]] || [[word:chadatufush|chadatufush]] || [[word:chadatuf|chadatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chadatethe|chadatethe]] || [[word:chadateje|chadateje]] || [[word:chadateshe|chadateshe]] || [[word:chadate|chadate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chadatothoth|chadatothoth]] || [[word:chadatojoj|chadatojoj]] || [[word:chadatoshosh|chadatoshosh]] || [[word:chadat|chadat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chadatotho|chadatotho]] || [[word:chadatojo|chadatojo]] || [[word:chadatosho|chadatosho]] || [[word:chadato|chadato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chadatofoth|chadatofoth]] || [[word:chadatofoj|chadatofoj]] || [[word:chadatofosh|chadatofosh]] || [[word:chadatof|chadatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chadat忙th忙|chadat忙th忙]] || [[word:chadat忙j忙|chadat忙j忙]] || [[word:chadat忙sh忙|chadat忙sh忙]] || [[word:chadat忙|chadat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chadatathath|chadatathath]] || [[word:chadatajaj|chadatajaj]] || [[word:chadatashash|chadatashash]] || [[word:chadat|chadat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chadatatha|chadatatha]] || [[word:chadataja|chadataja]] || [[word:chadatasha|chadatasha]] || [[word:chadata|chadata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chadatafath|chadatafath]] || [[word:chadatafaj|chadatafaj]] || [[word:chadatafash|chadatafash]] || [[word:chadataf|chadataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chadatasha|chadatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochadatasha|gochadatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichadatasha|gokichadatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chadatn眉sha|chadatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochadatnkn眉sha|gochadatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichadatn眉sha|gokichadatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chadatsh毛sha|chadatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochadatnksh毛sha|gochadatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichadatsh毛sha|gokichadatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chadatrosha|chadatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochadatnkrosha|gochadatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichadatrosha|gokichadatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chadatmusha|chadatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochadatnkmusha|gochadatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichadatmusha|gokichadatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chadatsherasha|chadatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochadatnksherasha|gochadatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichadatsherasha|gokichadatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chadatngasha|chadatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochadatnkngasha|gochadatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichadatngasha|gokichadatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chadatyasha|chadatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochadatnkyasha|gochadatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichadatyasha|gokichadatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chadatyamasha|chadatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochadatnkyamasha|gochadatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichadatyamasha|gokichadatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chadatn眉sh毛sha|chadatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochadatnkn眉sh毛sha|gochadatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichadatn眉sh毛sha|gokichadatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chadatn眉rosha|chadatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochadatnkn眉rosha|gochadatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichadatn眉rosha|gokichadatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadatn眉musha|chadatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochadatnkn眉musha|gochadatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichadatn眉musha|gokichadatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chadatsh毛n眉sha|chadatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochadatnksh毛n眉sha|gochadatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichadatsh毛n眉sha|gokichadatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chadatsh毛rosha|chadatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochadatnksh毛rosha|gochadatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichadatsh毛rosha|gokichadatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadatsh毛musha|chadatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochadatnksh毛musha|gochadatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichadatsh毛musha|gokichadatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chadatron眉sha|chadatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochadatnkron眉sha|gochadatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichadatron眉sha|gokichadatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chadatrosh毛sha|chadatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochadatnkrosh毛sha|gochadatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichadatrosh毛sha|gokichadatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadatromusha|chadatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochadatnkromusha|gochadatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichadatromusha|gokichadatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chadatmun眉sha|chadatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochadatnkmun眉sha|gochadatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichadatmun眉sha|gokichadatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chadatmush毛sha|chadatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochadatnkmush毛sha|gochadatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichadatmush毛sha|gokichadatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chadatmurosha|chadatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochadatnkmurosha|gochadatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichadatmurosha|gokichadatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chadat|chadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙d忙t|ch忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochadat|hochadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙d忙t|hoch忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochadat|hohochadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙d忙t|hohoch忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chadat|n眉chadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙d忙t|n眉ch忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chadat|n眉n眉chadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙d忙t|n眉n眉ch忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chadat|n茂chadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙d忙t|n茂ch忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chadat|n茂n茂chadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙d忙t|n茂n茂ch忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchadat|luchadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙d忙t|luch忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchadat|luluchadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙d忙t|luluch忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichadat|lichadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙d忙t|lich忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichadat|lilichadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙d忙t|lilich忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochadat|kochadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙d忙t|koch忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochadat|kokochadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙d忙t|kokoch忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechadat|kechadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙d忙t|kech忙d忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechadat|kekechadat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙d忙t|kekech忙d忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
